title: donella ambrensis
intro: Donella ambrensis, also known as the 'Queen of the Night', is a nocturnal flowering plant that blooms only at night, native to the tropical forests of Madagascar. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where its extracts have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, digestive problems, and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Donella ambrensis include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce inflammation, protect against cell damage, and fight off infections. Herbal preparations of Donella ambrensis include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
